patterns_discovered.widget_organization: centralized export pattern for offline widgets
patterns_discovered.state_management: consumer widget pattern with riverpod integration
patterns_discovered.ui_states: state-based banner rendering with switch statement
patterns_discovered.resource_management: proper animation controller disposal in dispose()

gotchas_discovered.visibility_logic: complex state-based visibility management with transition detection
gotchas_discovered.async_operations: Future.delayed for auto-dismiss needs proper mounted state checking
gotchas_discovered.provider_timing: multiple provider watchers need careful state ordering
gotchas_discovered.animation_scope: AnimationController must be managed within StatefulWidget lifecycle

approach_outcome.completeness: all acceptance criteria met with comprehensive feature set
approach_outcome.integration: ready for app shell integration in subtask 7.6

recommendations.testing: add unit tests for banner visibility logic and state transitions
recommendations.performance: consider memoization for expensive operations in state handlers
recommendations.accessibility: add semantic labels for screen readers
recommendations.documentation: consider adding examples to pub.dev documentation
recommendations.maintenance: extract reusable UI components like progress indicators and buttons
